title: 日本ダービーの後に・目指すべきは

text_block_list.name: Crowd
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Right...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I won... I know I won, but...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I can't stop thinking about the complete and utter
determination she had while running.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Why do I feel like I've lost somehow?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Man, you tell me.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Vodka...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: You won. You could at least be happy about it.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You're not mad? Even though I took first place at
the Derby from you?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Even though I stole your big cool moment from
you?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: So what? I'll just take my place back.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You beat me in the Derby today. Which means,
the next time I beat you it'll be even cooler.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: So keep on upping the stakes.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Because I'll be the one havin' the last laugh.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On our way back home...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
She was so confident... about beating me next
time.

text_block_list.name: Crowd
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
There's only one way to describe her performance
today—spectacular!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
She'll live forever in our hearts as the number one
Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: What the heck is up with this?! She lost! I won!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
So why is it that, in my head... she's the one who's
number one?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Cool? What does that even mean?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That night...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer. Sorry to come by so late.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I can't accept this. I have to beat her again.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I can't let her take the number one spot from me!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I don't want to fall behind her. So you have to
train me up the best you can.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
If I'm going to be number one, I can't let her beat
me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A brilliant flame burns in Daiwa Scarlet's eyes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's still not really able to see where this quest
for "number one" will take her, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With how far we've come together, I think I've
found a few clues.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Next up is the Shuka Sho, the last race of the
Triple Tiara.
